_comment: Example corrected API response for: 'Should RA Groups expand SME lending into UAE with a budget of 2 million USD over 18 months?'

rationale: UAE SME lending market valued at $2.5B growing 14% annually — medium competition (source: static benchmark, confidence=0.30)
ROI 18.4%, IRR 19.1% — meets RA Groups IRR threshold (≥18%) but ROI gap = -6.6% below target
RA Groups has existing Dubai presence and prior India expansion success — strategic fit=High
key_risks: Market size data from static benchmarks (confidence=0.30) — actual market may differ
Financial projections based on estimated lending rate (World Bank returned no live data for AE)
Limited UAE market experience despite Dubai headquarters
conditions: Secure regulatory approval from UAE Central Bank before committing full budget
Establish local NBFC partnership to reduce time-to-market
next_steps: Initiate regulatory pre-application with UAE Central Bank
Identify 2-3 local NBFC partners for co-lending arrangement
decision.summary: Score 54.2 triggers GO_WITH_CONDITIONS. Financial metrics narrowly meet IRR target but miss ROI target. UAE presence provides strategic advantage but data confidence is only 0.47 due to static market benchmarks — decision should be revisited when live data is available.

confidence_report.label: Low
confidence_report._comment: Confidence is LOW — not 100% — because market and financial data came from static/partial sources

market_agent._note: World Bank returned GDP/inflation live but lending_rate fell back to static

financial_agent._note: Macro indicators partially live; sector sentiment from ETF proxy

knowledge_agent._note: RA Groups internal dataset — complete, well-structured JSON file

confidence_report._is_reliable_note: False because confidence < 0.50 threshold on market and financial agents

supervisor_warnings: [BUDGET_MISSING] No budget amount found in query text — used UI field value $2,000,000
[TIMELINE_UI] Timeline '18 months' from UI field (not mentioned in query)

market_insights._lending_rate_note: static fallback — World Bank returned null for AE lending rate
market_insights.summary: UAE SME lending market shows stable macroeconomic conditions with moderate competition...

company_strengths: Past GCC exposure via Dubai HQ

execution_log.budget_note: From UI field (no amount in query)

execution_log._note: MIN rule applied: prev=0.55, current=0.42 → final=0.42
